entity.summary: Centralized cryptocurrency exchange launched by Blue Helix in late 2018. In September 2021, BHEX announced a staged permanent closure in response to changing regulatory requirements, stopped successive trading functions during October, and set October 23 as the point after which users could no longer access the website or app.
entity.notes: Launch is stored at month precision because contemporary coverage said the exchange was scheduled to launch at the end of November 2018. Closure reporting preserves several staged deadlines; HEI uses 2021-10-23 as the final platform-access date while noting that trading functions ended earlier.

events.title: BHEX Exchange launched
events.description: Blue Helix launched BHEX as a centralized digital-asset exchange at the end of 2018.
events.notes: Month-level marker derived from contemporary launch coverage.

events.title: BHEX completed its staged platform shutdown
events.description: BHEX permanently ended platform access after progressively stopping registration, deposits, derivatives, spot trading, and withdrawals during its October 2021 wind-down.
events.notes: Reports preserve both October 16 and October 23 milestones. HEI uses October 23 because the detailed wind-down schedule identified it as the date after which users could no longer log in to the website or app.

evidence.title: BHEX Exchange, founded by former CTO of Huobi set to launch
evidence.notes: Contemporary report identifies Blue Helix, the BHEX exchange identity, and the planned end-of-week launch.

evidence.title: Crypto exchange BHEX permanently closes platform services
evidence.notes: Preserves the staged closure schedule, including the October 23 final platform-access deadline.

evidence.title: BHEX exchange announces permanent closure schedule
evidence.notes: Confirms that the closure was permanent and tied to global regulatory-compliance requirements; it describes October 16 as a full-closure milestone.

evidence.title: Exchange shutdowns accelerate amid regulatory changes
evidence.notes: Independent reporting confirms BHEX's permanent-closure announcement in the broader regulatory context.
